'''nachaha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:sabermetrics|sabermetrics]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-ch-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:sabermetrics|sabermetrics]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| nachaha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:næchæhæth|næchæhæth]] || [[word:næchæhæj|næchæhæj]] || [[word:næchæhæsh|næchæhæsh]] || [[word:næchæhæ|næchæhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nachachahath|nachachahath]] || [[word:nachachahaj|nachachahaj]] || [[word:nachachahash|nachachahash]] || [[word:nachachaha|nachachaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nachahath|nachahath]] || [[word:nachahaj|nachahaj]] || [[word:nachahash|nachahash]] || [[word:nachaha|nachaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nachafhath|nachafhath]] || [[word:nachafhaj|nachafhaj]] || [[word:nachafhash|nachafhash]] || [[word:nachafhaf|nachafhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nachahatha|nachahatha]] || [[word:nachahaja|nachahaja]] || [[word:nachahasha|nachahasha]] || [[word:nachahaka|nachahaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nachahath|nachahath]] || [[word:nachahaj|nachahaj]] || [[word:nachahash|nachahash]] || [[word:nachaha|nachaha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nachahathal|nachahathal]] || [[word:nachahajal|nachahajal]] || [[word:nachahashal|nachahashal]] || [[word:nachahakal|nachahakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nachahathatha|nachahathatha]] || [[word:nachahajaja|nachahajaja]] || [[word:nachahashasha|nachahashasha]] || [[word:nachahaka|nachahaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nachahathan|nachahathan]] || [[word:nachahajan|nachahajan]] || [[word:nachahashan|nachahashan]] || [[word:nachahakan|nachahakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nachahathaoro|nachahathaoro]] || [[word:nachahajaoro|nachahajaoro]] || [[word:nachahashaoro|nachahashaoro]] || [[word:nachahakaoro|nachahakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
